name: Tech Challenge - Ordens de Serviço
description: Dashboard de monitoramento das Ordens de Serviço - Fase 3

pages.name: Visão Geral
pages.description: Métricas gerais da aplicação e ordens de serviço

widgets.title: Volume Diário de Ordens de Serviço

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) as 'Ordens criadas' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' AND request.uri LIKE '%ordens-de-servico%' AND request.method = 'POST' SINCE 1 day ago TIMESERIES 1 hour
SELECT count(*) as 'Total de Ordens' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' AND request.uri LIKE '%ordens-de-servico%' SINCE 1 day ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) as 'Taxa de Erro %' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: Tempo Médio de Execução por Status da Ordem

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(duration) * 1000 as 'Tempo médio (ms)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' AND request.uri LIKE '%ordens-de-servico%' FACET CASES(WHERE request.uri LIKE '%status=DIAGNOSTICO%' AS 'Diagnóstico', WHERE request.uri LIKE '%status=EXECUCAO%' AS 'Execução', WHERE request.uri LIKE '%status=FINALIZADO%' AS 'Finalização') SINCE 1 day ago

widgets.title: Tempo Médio de Resposta das APIs (ms)

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(duration) * 1000 as 'Latência (ms)' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' FACET request.uri SINCE 1 day ago TIMESERIES 30 minutes LIMIT 10
SELECT count(*) as 'Quantidade', latest(errorMessage) as 'Mensagem', latest(request.uri) as 'Endpoint' FROM TransactionError WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' FACET errorClass SINCE 1 day ago LIMIT 20
SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) as 'Requisições/min' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' SINCE 1 day ago TIMESERIES 10 minutes

pages.name: Infraestrutura Kubernetes
pages.description: CPU, memória e saúde do cluster

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(cpuUsedCores / cpuLimitCores * 100) as 'CPU %' FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE clusterName = 'tech-challenge-cluster' FACET nodeName SINCE 1 hour ago TIMESERIES 5 minutes

SELECT average(memoryUsedBytes / 1048576) as 'Memória (Mi)' FROM K8sContainerSample WHERE clusterName = 'tech-challenge-cluster' AND namespaceName = 'tech-challenge' FACET podName SINCE 1 hour ago TIMESERIES 5 minutes
SELECT uniqueCount(podName) FROM K8sPodSample WHERE clusterName = 'tech-challenge-cluster' AND namespaceName = 'tech-challenge' FACET status SINCE 10 minutes ago

SELECT latest(currentReplicas) as 'Réplicas Atuais', latest(desiredReplicas) as 'Réplicas Desejadas' FROM K8sHpaSample WHERE clusterName = 'tech-challenge-cluster' FACET hpaName SINCE 1 hour ago TIMESERIES 5 minutes

SELECT latest(status) as 'Status', latest(createdAt) as 'Criado em', latest(nodeName) as 'Node' FROM K8sPodSample WHERE clusterName = 'tech-challenge-cluster' AND namespaceName = 'tech-challenge' FACET podName SINCE 10 minutes ago
SELECT timestamp, level, message, trace.id, span.id FROM Log WHERE service.name = 'Tech-Challenge' AND level IN ('ERROR', 'WARN') SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 50
SELECT count(*) FROM Log WHERE service.name = 'Tech-Challenge' FACET level SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration.ms) as 'Duração média (ms)', count(*) as 'Quantidade' FROM Span WHERE appName = 'Tech-Challenge' FACET name SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 10 ORDER BY average(duration.ms) DESC
